meaning: A mysterious letter opening this chapter (followed by وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ)
that (connects 'they were amazed' with 'a warner came')
he came to them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned later as ٱلْكٰفِرُونَ)
so he said (after they were amazed)
the ones who reject/deny (plural, subject of قَالَ)
this (masculine, pointing to عَجِيبٌ - something strange)
we died (in أَءِذَا مِتْنَا - when we died)
return, coming back (describes ذٰلِكَ as subject)
and with us (connected to كِتٰبٌ - a book is with us)
a matter (that is affected by فِي)
above them (referring to the sky السَّمَآءِ)
we built it (referring to السَّمَآءِ/the sky)
and we beautified it (referring to السَّمَاء/the sky)
for it/to it (feminine) (referring to السَّمَآءِ - the sky)
we extended it (referring to الأرض - the earth)
from/of (connects كُلِّ زَوْجٍۭ بَهِيجٍ to what came before)
as a means of insight (for عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ - the returning servant)
one who constantly turns back (in repentance) (possessed by عَبْدٍ)
and we sent down repeatedly/gradually (the blessed rain from السَّمَآءِ)
water (object of نَزَّلْنَا - We sent down)
and so we made (something) grow (connected to مَآءً مُّبٰرَكًا)
the harvested (crops that were cut down)
and the palm tree (object being described by بَاسِقٰتٍ)
tall ones (feminine plural, describing النَّخْلَ palm trees)
surely for it/her (referring to النَّخْلَ - the palm trees)
perfectly arranged in layers (describing طَلْعٌ/fruit clusters)
as an abundant provision (for للعباد - for the servants)
and we gave life (to بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا - a dead land)
like that/similarly (referring to how Allah brings forth the dead on the Day of Resurrection, just as He brings dead land back to life)
she strongly denied/rejected (the people before قَبْلَهُمْ)
the deep well (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ - people of)
of the thicket (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ - companions)
and thus became true (consequence of كَذَّبَ 'they denied')
did We then become weary/unable? (connected to بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ - with the first creation)
by/with the creation (connected to عَيِينَا - were we tired)
but rather (correcting the previous statement about being tired with creation)
a creation (being acted upon in فِى لَبْسٍ مِّنْ)
new (describing خَلْقٍ/creation, showing it follows مِنْ/from)
the human being (as the object being created in وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا)
his self (the one doing the whispering)
to him/it (connected to نَعْلَمُ - we know)
the jugular vein (connected to حَبْلِ/cord in this ayah)
when (referring to a specific time in the past, introducing يَتَلَقَّى)
he receives/is receiving (referring to the angel who records deeds)
the two who receive intensely/repeatedly (referring to the two angels)
the left side (direction from which an angel sits)
a watcher (referring to an angel who records deeds)
not any (followed by يَلْفِظُ - he utters)
except (what follows is different from لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ)
with him, near him (watching over قَوْلٍ)
a watchful observer (referring to the recording angel)
ready/prepared (describing رَقِيبٌ as an indefinite adjective)
and she came (subject of سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ)
from him/it (referring to what you were trying to avoid)
and she came (subject of كُلُّ نَفْسٍ)
you were (referring to the person being addressed in غَفْلَةٍ/heedlessness)
in (connects غَفْلَةٍ 'heedlessness' to what comes after)
in a state of unawareness (of هٰذَا/this)
so we removed a cover (from عَنكَ - from you)
from you (object of كَشَفْنَا - we removed)
your cover (object of كَشَفْنَا - we uncovered)
today (time when فَبَصَرُكَ حَدِيدٌ - your sight is sharp)
this (pointing to something near) (subject of عَتِيدٌ)
with me (referring to what is عَتِيدٌ/ready)
a transgressor (described with مَّنَّاعٍ and مُّرِيبٍ)
the one who (placed another god with Allah)
he made/set (subject of the phrase 'who made' with ٱلَّذِى)
so throw him (command to two angels)
our Lord (object of قَالَ - he said)
but/however (connects this contrast to previous statement)
you (all) argue with others (in response to قَالَ لَا)
with me, at my place (connected to قَالَ - he said)
to you all (object of قَدَّمْتُ - I had presented)
with the warning/threat (related to قَدَّمْتُ - I had already presented)
with me (connected to يُبَدَّلُ - is changed)
with/by one who constantly wrongs (related to أَنَا)
to Hell (being addressed in يَوْمَ نَقُولُ - the Day We will say)
do/does/did? (asking جَهَنَّمَ if it is full)
any more (asking about more in هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍ - is there any more?)
and was brought close (referring to الجنة/Paradise)
Paradise (as the subject being brought near in وَأُزْلِفَتِ)
for the ones who guard against (evil)
that which (object of تُوعَدُونَ - you are promised)
you (all) are being promised/warned (what is mentioned in هٰذَا مَا)
for every (describing what is promised in تُوعَدُونَ)
one who constantly returns to Allah (describing كُلِّ - each/every)
a constant guardian/protector (describing أَوَّابٍ - one who frequently returns to Allah)
he feared respectfully (subject of جَآءَ - he came)
The Most Merciful (as the object being feared in مَّنْ خَشِىَ)
in the unseen realm (connected to خَشِىَ - feared)
with a heart (that belongs to مُّنِيب - one who turns back to Allah)
that (pointing to something far and specific)
for them/they have (what يَشَآءُونَ they wish)
they want/wish (what they want in this life)
and with us/and in our possession (connected to مَّا يَشَآءُونَ)
And how many (connects to أَهْلَكْنَا - We destroyed)
before them (referring to the previous nations mentioned in وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا - 'And how many We destroyed')
they/them (referring to the previous nations mentioned in قَرْنٍ)
from them (referring to the previous generations mentioned in قَرْنٍ)
and so they searched thoroughly (in البِلٰدِ - the lands)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to what was mentioned before)
or (connecting two options: having a heart OR listening attentively)
We created (connected to وَلَقَدْ - and indeed)
and the earth (object of خَلَقْنَا/we created)
between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)
so be patient! (in response to what they say)
and glorify! (connected to فَٱصْبِرْ - so be patient)
the night (possessed by what comes after)
so glorify Him! (command in response to وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ - and from the night)
and listen carefully! (command to يَوْمَ يُنَادِ)
the caller (who calls out on يَوْمَ)
the single loud cry (object of يَسْمَعُونَ - they hear)
with the truth (describes how يَسْمَعُونَ happens)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to يَوْمَ/Day mentioned before)
the Day (of الْخُرُوجِ - the coming out)
we (subject of نُحْىِۦ - we give life)
we give life (connected to وَنُمِيتُ - and we cause death)
and we cause to die (connected to نُحْىِۦ - we give life)
and to us (connected to المَصِيرُ - the return)
splits open by itself (subject is الْأَرْضُ - the earth)
away from them (object of تَشَقَّقُ - the earth splits away from them)
quickly/hastening (describes how the earth splits open)
that (pointing to the gathering mentioned in the next word حَشْرٌ)
and what/and not (negating يَقُولُونَ - they say)
with/by the Quran (referring to the divine revelation)
